lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Be careful in here, there's lots of dangerous equipment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does this machine do?

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Nothing at the moment... It's broken. It's meant to be a transmutation machine.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: It has also spent time as a time travel machine, and a dramatic lightning generator, and a thing for generating monsters.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is this your house?

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: No, I'm just one of the tenants. It belongs to the count who lives in the basement.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does the portal machine do?

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Ah, an interesting question! I believe it should create a rift in the very fabric of space! Opening a portal to some, hitherto undiscovered plane that exists parallel to our own.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: It's a teleport machine.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the interdimensional rift without wearing insulated boots

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: [Player name] before you go through there I must warn you that there are flashing lights and strobe effects on the other side. If you are an epilepsy sufferer you must NOT enter! Do you still want to go through?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I still want to go in.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: All right. Good luck then.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Errr, just before you go through there...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the problem?

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: That portal opens into a plane populated with some very shocking creatures. You should wear some kind of insulated armour before going there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I want to go in and don't show me this message again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I dont want to go in.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: That's a good decision, if you ask me.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Errr, just before you go through there...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the problem?

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: That portal opens into a plane populated with some very shocking creatures. You should wear some kind of insulated armour before going there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get insulated armour from?

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Well there were some pretty tough people here last week. Said they were Slayer Masters. They were planning on making some protective boots. You should speak to one of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll do that.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: No problem. See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to run around after Slayer Masters, I'm going through.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Fair enough, just don't say I didn't warn you

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I think I'll stay here for a while then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the warning, but I'm not scared of any monster.

lines.speaker: Professor Oddenstein
lines.text: Ok. Just don't say I didn't warn you
